notes: OKX Wallet is NOT a traditional leaderboard. It provides wallet-level PnL for connected addresses. The 'trader' concept maps to wallet addresses. This is used for enrichment/cross-reference only.

leaderboard_endpoints.notes: Returns hot wallets by activity/PnL. NOT a traditional trader leaderboard. Concept mismatch: wallets ≠ traders.

profile_endpoints.notes: Wallet summary: balance, token holdings, DeFi positions

web3.roi_sort_notes: OKX Wallet does not have ROI-based sorting. It tracks wallet-level metrics. ROI computation would require historical balance snapshots which are not reliably available.

7d.reason: OKX Wallet hot wallets endpoint does not provide windowed ROI data. It shows current state.

degradation_strategy.description: OKX Wallet data is used ONLY to enrich existing traders found on other platforms. It does NOT generate its own leaderboard. When a trader's on-chain address is known, we fetch wallet data to add DeFi position context.
degradation_strategy.mapping: If a trader on Bybit/OKX also has a linked wallet address, we fetch OKX Wallet data and attach as enrichment_data in trader_profiles.provenance

web3.missing_reason: OKX Wallet is not a trading leaderboard. It provides wallet analytics, not trading performance metrics.
